channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Akpabio Calls On World Legislatures To Promote Peace And Justice Through Leadership
item.description: Senate President Godswill Akpabio don call on parliaments all over the world make dem stand strong for peace, justice, and humanity, especially as wahala dey rise everywhere. He yarn this matter for t...

item.title: Temptation Island Contestant's Affair Exposed, Leading to Public Revenge
item.description: A recent episode of the reality television show 'Temptation Island' has been rocked by a shocking betrayal and subsequent public retaliation. A male contestant was caught engaging in an affair with no...

item.title: Africa50 plans major investments in Tanzania’s infrastructure to support Dira 2050 implementation
item.description: Africa50, a pan-African infrastructure investment platform established by the African Development Bank (AfDB), has expressed its readiness to invest in Tanzania’s key strategic infrastructure projects...

item.title: Relationship Challenges Plague Vincent and Claudia in ‘The Alibi’
item.description: The ABS-CBN Entertainment Studios series “The Alibi” continues to draw viewers in with its complex storyline and engaging characters. A recent article highlights ten particularly significant conflicts...

item.title: Parole granted to man convicted of murdering his wife despite undisclosed body location
item.description: Glyn Razzell, who was convicted in 2003 for the murder of his estranged wife Linda Razzell, is set to be released from prison. Linda disappeared in 2002 while on her way to work in Swindon, and her bo...

item.title: Julius Malema receives five-year prison sentence after conviction for unlawful firearm possession
item.description: South African opposition leader Julius Malema, head of the Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF), has been sentenced to five years in prison after being found guilty of unlawful possession of a firearm. The...

item.title: Philippines confirmed as venue for the 2026 Asia and Oceania Sambo Championships this June
item.description: The Philippines has been officially chosen to host the 2026 Asia and Oceania Sambo Championships, set to take place this June. The event marks a major milestone for the Pilipinas Sambo Federation as i...

item.title: ADC Claims Tinubu and APC Orchestrated Suspension of Atiku, Lawal
item.description: A chieftain of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Eze Chukwuemeka Eze, has fired a strong condemnation, accusing President Bola Tinubu and the All Progressives Congress (APC) of manipulating the p...

item.title: Labour Party denies claims of endorsing Tinubu for 2027 election
item.description: The Labour Party (LP) don come out talk say e no endorse President Bola Tinubu for second term ahead of the 2027 general election. Dem release this statement through the Sokoto State Chairman and also...

item.title: Kirsten Dunst’s Most Memorable Film Roles, Ranked from Early Success to Modern Masterpieces
item.description: This article from The Guardian celebrates Kirsten Dunst’s career as she nears her 44th birthday, ranking twenty of her best film performances from early child stardom to her mature and nuanced recent ...

item.title: Canadian Senate Bill Seeks to Recognize Modern Military Veterans
item.description: A new private member's bill in the Canadian Senate aims to broaden the definition of “war veteran” to include those who served in conflicts since the Korean War, particularly those who participated in...

item.title: Regional fuel prices climb as global tensions disrupt supply chains
item.description: Kenya has overtaken its East African neighbours to record the highest fuel prices in the region, with motorists in Nairobi paying about Ksh206.97 (roughly Tsh4,150) per litre of petrol. The recent ris...

item.title: Eldoret Hospital Fined for Patient Data Breach and Privacy Violation
item.description: A local hospital in Eldoret has been slapped with a hefty fine of Sh525,000 by the Office of the Data Protection Commissioner (ODPC) after a patient's sensitive medical data was mishandled. Merceline ...

item.title: Mandelson Vetting Controversy: Badenoch Accuses PM of Misleading Parliament
item.description: Conservative politician Kemi Badenoch has accused Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer of misleading the House of Commons regarding the security vetting of Lord Mandelson for his role as US ambassador. The...

item.title: Dry Doddington’s historic St James Church seeks £100,000 to restore its damaged floor and walls
item.description: St James Church in Dry Doddington, Lincolnshire, is appealing for £100,000 to carry out major restoration work on its fourteenth-century building. Known for its leaning tower, which tilts at 5.1 degre...

item.title: PM Shehbaz attends Antalya Diplomacy Forum during Turkiye visit
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has arrived in Antalya, Turkiye, marking the third stop of his tri-nation tour following visits to Saudi Arabia and Qatar. He was warmly received at the airport by Antaly...

item.title: Church in Wales Makes Same-Sex Marriage Blessings Permanent
item.description: The Church in Wales has formally approved a bill to make blessings for same-sex marriages permanent. The decision follows a temporary measure introduced in 2021 that allowed same-sex couples to have t...

item.title: PTI Leaders Absent During Scheduled Court-Approved Meeting with Imran Khan at Adiala Jail
item.description: On Thursday, none of the senior PTI leaders arrived at Adiala Jail to meet former Prime Minister Imran Khan, despite their names being submitted to the prison administration. The Islamabad High Court ...

item.title: Chris Pronger reflects on life after hockey with new book and broadcasting work
item.description: Chris Pronger, the Hall of Fame NHL defenceman, has embarked on a new phase of his life following his retirement from professional hockey. Forced to retire in 2011 due to a serious eye injury and conc...

item.title: Moises Caicedo Extends Stay at Chelsea Until 2033
item.description: Chelsea midfielder Moises Caicedo don agree new contract wey go keep am for Stamford Bridge until 2033. Di 24-year-old Ecuador international don been dey play key role for Chelsea success last season,...
